model_update.manual: Re-transcribe all 8,242 values. Estimated 15.2 hours (data block only).
model_update.compiler: Re-run compiler: ~30 seconds. No manual work.

plc_retarget.manual: Rewrite all FOR loops and array sizing for new PLC memory layout. Estimated 4-6 hours for architecture change.
plc_retarget.compiler: Change one parameter: target='s7-1500'. Fully automated.

value_proposition.correctness: Mathematical guarantee vs human error probability
value_proposition.maintainability: Model update = recompile. No code maintenance.
value_proposition.portability: S7-1200 and S7-1500 from same codebase.
value_proposition.auditability: Generated code is deterministic and reproducible.
